source: reviewed/Ars Magica - Definitive Edition (Core Rules).md (Order of Hermes; Mythic Europe)

elements.name: The Order of Hermes
elements.summary: ~1,200 magi in thirteen Tribunals, bound by the Parma Magica and the Code of Hermes.
elements.wants: Preserve itself, enforce the Code, and keep magi safe from each other and from mundanes.
elements.as_thread: Order politics — a Tribunal, a Quaesitor, a rival House — pulls the covenant in.

elements.name: The Quaesitores & Hoplites
elements.summary: House Guernicus' investigators and the combat-magi (Hoplites) who enforce Hermetic law.
elements.wants: Uncover and punish breaches of the Code; deter Wizard's Wars and diabolism.
elements.as_thread: An investigation or enforcement action reaches the covenant.

elements.name: The Church
elements.summary: Christendom under the Pope; backed by the Divine, wielding tithes, canon law, and the threat of Crusade.
elements.wants: Save souls, uphold orthodoxy, root out heresy and diabolism, defend its temporal power.
elements.as_thread: Clergy grow suspicious, or a holy matter entangles the covenant.

elements.name: The Nobility
elements.summary: Feudal lords bound by oaths of fealty, trading land for military service.
elements.wants: Land, heirs, prestige, and any edge — including a magical one — pursued by marriage, war, and overture.
elements.as_thread: A lord's ambition, lawsuit, or feud touches covenant lands.

elements.name: Towns & Guilds
elements.summary: Walled towns and great fairs run by merchant councils, somewhat outside feudalism.
elements.wants: Trade, charters, and profit; wary of the strange and the Gifted.
elements.as_thread: A guild dispute, fair, or charter matter draws the covenant into town affairs.

elements.name: The Peasantry
elements.summary: ~90% of people; nearly powerless, illiterate but not ignorant; the supernatural is ordinary village life.
elements.wants: Survival, a fair harvest, protection; they fear magi but may accept 'their' wizards as fair lords.
elements.as_thread: Covenfolk or villagers bring a crisis, a rumour, or a fearful mob.

elements.name: Diabolists & Infernal Cults
elements.summary: Humans who sell their souls, lending demons the patience and follow-through demons lack.
elements.wants: Power, vengeance, or pleasure bought with damnation; to corrupt and conceal.
elements.as_thread: A hidden diabolist works corruption near the covenant.

elements.name: The Faerie Courts
elements.summary: The shifting courts of Arcadia, Elysium, and Eudokia — kings, queens, tricksters, and the Wild Hunt.
elements.wants: To draw humans into their stories and feed on the Vitality of played-out tales.
elements.as_thread: A faerie court's game, bargain, or grievance ensnares the covenant.
